title: Aurora 33845 Palm Pals Butters Popcorn 5in, Soft Toy, Multicolour
features: Introducing Palm Pals Butters Popcorn, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Butters Popcorn is the ultimate movie fan and is always ready for a movie marathon! It is a yellow, red and white coloured soft and cuddly toy filled with beans that perfectly fit in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. Butters Popcorn is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable Butters Popcorn soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Craving collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range offers a variety of collections like Aquatic, Pets, Zoo, Whimsical and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Butters Popcorn measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable multicolour box which has popcorn on the top. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming multi-coloured soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Introducing Butters Popcorn, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection is a soft and cuddly plush toy filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand. Butters Popcorn is the ultimate movie fan and is always ready for a movie marathon! It is a yellow, red and white coloured soft and cuddly toy filled with beans that perfectly fit in your hand. This multicolour Butters Popcorn is part of the Palm Pals Craving collection, which is just one of the many wonderful collections offered by Palm Pals like Aquatic, Pets, Zoo, Sports and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Butters Popcorn soft toy measures 13cm. These gorgeous and irresistibly cute toys make great gifts for any occasion whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable popcorn in a box looking like a soft toy. This is a hugely collectable range. As part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, Butters Popcorn comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable and cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience designing and manufacturing innovative, high-quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
